nasb.text: All these were the sons of Heman the king’s seer to exalt him according to the words of God, for God gave fourteen sons and three daughters to Heman.

esv.text: All these were the sons of Heman the king’s seer, according to the promise of God to exalt him, for God had given Heman fourteen sons and three daughters.

cnv.text: 這些人都是希幔的兒子；希幔是王的先見，照著　神的話高舉他。　神賜給希幔十四個兒子，三個女兒。

ccb.text: 希幔是王的先见，上帝恩宠他，按应许赐给他十四个儿子、三个女儿。
